reference: You can certainly double the dose, but before adjusting medication, it is important to note that isolated high diastolic blood pressure responds well to salt restrictions, exercise, and weight reduction if you are overweight. Additionally, a thyroid test, kidney function test, and urine protein test should be conducted.
text: You can certainly double the dose, but before adjusting medication, it is important to note that isolated high diastolic blood pressure responds well to salt restrictions, exercise, and weight reduction if you are overweight. Additionally, a thyroid test, kidney function test, and urine protein test should be conducted.
